title: Card
description: Surface container for grouped content. May be static or clickable (link/card button) depending on context.

props.name: interactive
props.description: When true, card acts like a link/button and must support keyboard focus.

states.name: hover
effects: Slight elevation or border change within motion rules.

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

keyboard: If interactive, use <a> or <button> to get keyboard behavior for free.
Do not make entire card clickable if it contains other interactive elements (avoid nested interactive).
aria: If interactive, ensure accessible name (e.g. via heading text).

must: Card must have clear padding and separation from the background.
If interactive, focus indicator must be visible.
should: Use cards to group related content; avoid overusing for simple lists.
must_not: Do not nest links/buttons inside a clickable card root.

token_usage.notes: Optional subtle border on flat cards.
Use surface/overlay shadow depending on elevation.
